headline.uz: Afzalbek Oribjonov — mahsulot darajasidagi frontend, backend va AI integratsiyalarni birlashtiradigan developer.
headline.en: Afzalbek Oribjonov — a developer connecting product-grade frontend, backend, and AI integrations.

summary.uz: Men 2021 yildan beri Next.js, Python, MongoDB va AI integratsiyalar bilan ishlayman. Kuchli tomonlarim: UI tizimlari, API-friendly arxitektura, admin dashboardlar, real foydalanuvchi oqimlari va avtomatlashtirishga tayyor mahsulotlar.
summary.en: I have worked with Next.js, Python, MongoDB, and AI integrations since 2021. My strongest areas are UI systems, API-friendly architecture, admin dashboards, real user flows, and products prepared for automation.

uz: Portfolio, automation va admin-panel yo'nalishlarida loyihalar yaratildi.
Next.js frontendlar Python API va MongoDB arxitekturasi bilan bog'landi.
AI integratsiyalangan kontent va yordamchi botlar ishlab chiqildi.
en: Built projects across portfolio, automation, and admin-panel workflows.
Connected Next.js frontends with Python APIs and MongoDB architecture.
Developed AI-powered content tools and assistant bots.

description.uz: Production va beta darajadagi bir nechta foydalanuvchi yo'naltirilgan loyiha yaratildi.
description.en: Built multiple user-facing projects at beta and production quality.
